entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to No Maximum Entry Age | Children: 91 days to 25 years (91 days-5 years only if parent insured; 5-25 years can be insured individually)
premium_description: Age 20-35: ~INR 3,000-8,000/year for 5L cover | Age 36-50: ~INR 8,000-18,000/year for 5L cover | Age 50+: ~INR 18,000-35,000+/year for 5L cover. Premium varies by city tier, sum insured, and aggregate deductible opted.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping - Room Rent and ICU/ICCU charges covered At Actuals (Single Private AC Room covered). Proportionate deduction applies only if room category exceeds policy schedule stipulation.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered in Base Plan | Available via Parenthood Add-on up to INR 2,00,000 after 24 Months waiting (covers normal/C-section delivery, prenatal and postnatal expenses, IVF up to 2 cycles lifetime)
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% once per policy year for same/different illnesses (Automatic Restore Benefit). Unlimited Times restoration available via Unlimited Restore Add-on.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered (Standalone OPD consultations not covered; only pre-hospitalization and post-hospitalization expenses related to admissible hospitalization are covered)
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in (Protect Benefit covers 68 listed non-medical/consumable items including gloves, masks, PPE kits, nebulizer kits, food charges at no extra premium)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to Sum Insured via Optional Cover | Global Cover: Yes via Optional Rider (Emergency Treatments Only OR Emergency & Planned Treatments)
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) - No mandatory co-payment in base plan; optional Aggregate Deductible can be opted for premium discount
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network (~16,000 cashless healthcare providers across India)
no_claim_bonus_structure: 10% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a max of 100% (Cumulative Bonus). Plus Benefit adds 50% per year irrespective of claims up to 100% additional coverage.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all insured persons irrespective of claim status. Limits: Individual: INR 1,500-8,000 | Floater: INR 2,500-25,000 (varies by base sum insured)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - E-Opinion for 51 Critical Illnesses via network providers (digital second opinion). General tele-consultation available through app but not a formal policy benefit.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured (covers donor hospitalization for organ harvesting; excludes donor pre/post hospitalization expenses and organ transportation/preservation costs)

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 99 years | Children: 91 days to 30 years
premium_description: Zone-based pricing. Zone 1 (Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Kolkata, Gujarat) commands higher premiums than Zone 2 (Rest of India). Indicative annual premiums for INR 5 Lakh cover (Platinum+, Zone 1, Individual): Age 20-35 ~ INR 9,000-13,000; Age 36-50 ~ INR 15,000-25,000; Age 50+ ~ INR 35,000-50,000+. Premiums increase non-linearly with age bands and sum insured. Family floater premiums are based on eldest member's age.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping - All room categories covered (Single Private AC, Suite, etc.) at actuals. Option to voluntarily downgrade room category at purchase for premium reduction.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times for same and different illnesses (ReAssure+ / ReAssure Forever triggered after the first paid claim; remains active for life upon continuous renewal)
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered (Base plan); Optional Acute Care add-on available covering prescribed medicines and diagnostics up to INR 20,000 each plus unlimited teleconsultations
consumables_cover_status: No (Base plan); Yes - via Rider (Safeguard / Safeguard+ add-on covers non-payable items including gloves, PPE kits, surgical masks, etc.)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to INR 2,50,000 per hospitalization (Emergency only) | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay)
no_claim_bonus_structure: Booster+ Benefit: Carry forward unused base Sum Insured up to 5X of base coverage (Platinum+). Effectively accumulates unclaimed SI year-on-year without explicit percentage cap per year, subject to 5X maximum ceiling.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults aged 18 years and above. Up to INR 500 per INR 1 Lakh of Base Sum Insured (Individual max: INR 5,000 per person; Family Floater max: INR 10,000 per policy). Must be booked via Niva Bupa digital assets on cashless basis only.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited e-consultations via official Niva Bupa app. Live Healthy benefit: Up to 30% renewal discount via step-tracking on app.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured (harvesting expenses for donor payable only when insured's own hospitalization claim is approved)

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to Lifelong | Children: 90 days to 24 years (25 years at renewal)
premium_description: Age 20-35: ₹2,900 - ₹5,800/year for ₹5L cover (Low-Moderate) | Age 36-50: ₹6,500 - ₹12,000/year for ₹5L-₹10L cover (Moderate-High) | Age 50+: ₹15,500 - ₹28,500/year for ₹5L cover (High-Very High). Premium varies by city zone (Zone 1 highest, Zone 4 lowest).
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping - All room categories covered including Single Private AC Room. No separate ICU rent restriction.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times per policy year for same and different illnesses. Triggered after base Sum Insured, Cumulative Bonus, and Plus Benefit (if opted) are exhausted.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered in base plan. Optional OPD rider available (Care OPD) covering consultations, diagnostics, and pharmacy up to specified limits. Additional optional riders: Women Care (mammography, cervical cancer screening, PCOS/PCOD tests) and Mental Health Wellbeing (consultation, counseling, rehabilitation for depression, OCD, anxiety, PTSD).
consumables_cover_status: Yes - via Rider (Claim Shield covers 68 non-payable / non-medical items including gloves, PPE, surgical masks during hospitalization)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to INR 5,00,000 per year (domestic India only) | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay). Optional co-payment can be chosen at policy inception for premium reduction.
no_claim_bonus_structure: 50% increase in Sum Insured per year up to a max of 100% of base SI (Cumulative Bonus). Optional Cumulative Bonus Super rider increases coverage up to 500% of base SI over 5 consecutive years. NCB does not reduce on claim.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Available as Optional Add-on - Once for all Insured Persons every policy year. Not included in base cover.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited E-consultations with General Physicians via official network (Voice/Video Call/Chat/Email). Access to Health Portal, Discount Connect for OPD/diagnostics/pharmacy discounts, and Be-Fit gym access (optional) via mobile app.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured for organ harvesting expenses of the donor, subject to Transplantation of Human Organs Act, 1994 compliance.

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to No Limit | Children: 91 days to 25 years (Floater/Multi-Individual); 5 years minimum for Individual policy
premium_description: Age 20-35: Low to Moderate (~₹3,000–₹10,000/year for ₹5L–₹15L cover) | Age 36-50: Moderate to High (~₹8,000–₹25,000/year for ₹5L–₹15L cover) | Age 50+: High to Very High (~₹25,000–₹70,000+/year for ₹5L–₹15L cover). Premiums vary by zone, sum insured, and family composition. Multi-year discounts: 7.5% for 2 years, 10% for 3 years.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping - Actuals up to Base Sum Insured (Any room category including Single Private AC Room, Deluxe Suite, etc.). Optional Room Rent Type modifiers available: Single Private Room or Shared Accommodation.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times from 2nd claim onwards (Super Reload), up to Base Sum Insured per refill. Unlimited refills applicable for same or different illnesses during the policy year.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered (base plan). Optional add-ons available: Tele-OPD Consultation (unlimited e-consultations from General Physicians) and Chronic Management Program (OPD) for listed chronic conditions on cashless basis.
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in (Claim Protect covers all non-payable items listed in Annexure I Lists I, II, III, and IV).
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Not Covered (base plan); Optional Domestic Air Ambulance cover available as add-on. Global Cover: No (available only in Activ One VIP/VIP+ variants).
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) for Sum Insured ≥ INR 4 Lakhs. For Sum Insured ≤ INR 3 Lakhs: Zone-based mandatory co-pay applies (Zone II to I: 10%, Zone III to II: 15%, Zone III to I: 25%).
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network (12,000+ to 15,045+ cashless hospitals across 31 states and 4,800+ pin codes)
no_claim_bonus_structure: Super Credit - 100% increase in Base Sum Insured per year, up to a maximum of 500% of Base Sum Insured (capped at INR 3 Crores under this benefit). Bonus accrues irrespective of claim history.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults 18 years and above. Listed & Cashless once per policy year at Network Providers/Empanelled Service Providers or via digital mode. Covers BP, BMI, HWR, smoking status, Blood Sugar, and Total Cholesterol.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited Tele-OPD consultations available via optional add-on. Built-in HealthReturns™ program (up to 100% of premium back via Activ Health app for achieving fitness targets). Health Assessment™ (digital/physical) included once per year.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Base Sum Insured

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 125 years (lifelong renewability) | Children: 91 days to 30 years (if policy taken with parents); 91 days to 5 years eligible only under floater
premium_description: Age 20-35: ~INR 3,000 - 8,500/year for 5L-10L cover | Age 36-50: ~INR 5,500 - 15,000/year for 5L-10L cover | Age 50+: ~INR 12,000 - 35,000+/year for 5L-10L cover. Premium varies by zone, sum insured, tenure, and add-ons selected.
room_rent_capping_rules: Single Private AC Room
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to 10% of annual sum insured, maximum INR 1 lakh after 24 Months waiting (reducible to 12 months with add-on). Newborn baby cover up to 90 days at twice maternity coverage amount.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times in a policy year for related and unrelated illnesses (Reset Benefit)
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered in base plan. Available via BeFit add-on on cashless basis through IL TakeCare app (OPD consultations, pharmacy, physiotherapy, diagnostics)
consumables_cover_status: Yes - via Rider (Claim Protector add-on covers non-payable items like gloves, cotton, syringes, masks up to sum insured)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to Annual Sum Insured via optional add-on | Global Cover: Optional Worldwide Cover up to INR 3 Crore (cashless only, 2-year waiting period, age limit 65 years at issuance)
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay). Voluntary co-payment options of 10%, 20%, 30%, 40%, 50% available.
no_claim_bonus_structure: 20% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a max of 100% (Guaranteed Cumulative Bonus / Loyalty Bonus). Power Booster add-on provides 100% cumulative bonus every year irrespective of claims for indefinite period (not available with unlimited sum insured option).
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults. Predefined health check-up package up to 0.5% of annual sum insured, maximum INR 5,000 on cashless basis.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited tele-consultations via audio/video/chat through official app. Wellness program offering up to 30% renewal discount, credit score discount up to 15%, early renewal discount 2.5%, long tenure discount up to 15%.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured (as part of basic In-patient Treatment cover)

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 3 months to 30 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: ~INR 3,000 – 5,000/year for 5L cover | Age 36-50: ~INR 6,500 – 12,000/year for 5L-10L cover | Age 50+: ~INR 15,000 – 25,000/year for higher covers. Premiums vary significantly by sum insured, zone, and family composition.
room_rent_capping_rules: For SI INR 3 Lac to 10 Lac: Single Private AC Room | For SI above INR 10 Lac: Actuals (No Capping)
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered for SI 3-4 Lac | Covered up to INR 50,000 after 24 Months for SI 5-10 Lac | Covered up to INR 75,000 after 24 Months for SI 15-20 Lac | Covered up to INR 1,00,000 after 24 Months for SI above 20 Lac
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - Unlimited reinstatement of base Sum Insured for same/different illnesses (15-day gap applies for same insured) for SI ≥ 5 Lakh. Additionally, 20% recharge (max INR 25 Lacs) once per policy year for SI ≥ 5 Lakh.
opd_coverage_details: Covered via modular OPD wallet: Tele-consultation up to 15/month per insured via Insta-Consult; In-clinic doctor consultation up to 15/month per insured; Doctor-prescribed investigations/pathology & radiology (50% of OPD SI); Annual preventive health check-up (1 voucher individual / 2 vouchers floater). Weekly OPD limits: INR 5,000 for SI up to 50 Lac; INR 10,000 for SI above 50 Lac.
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in (Non-medical expenses/consumables covered up to In-patient Hospitalization Sum Insured)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance (Airlift): Covered up to INR 10 Lacs for SI above 50L up to 1Cr; up to INR 20 Lacs for SI above 1Cr (if opted in plan). Global Cover: Yes - Emergency Care only with 10% mandatory co-pay, 45 days per trip / 180 days cumulative per year.
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) for base domestic cover. 10% mandatory co-pay for International Cover only. Voluntary co-pay discount available.
no_claim_bonus_structure: 50% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a maximum of 100% (2 years). Bonus reduces by same rate if a claim is made.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults (1 voucher for Individual / 2 vouchers for Family Floater)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Up to 15 tele-consultations per month per insured via official Insta-Consult app. Unlimited subject to wallet limit. Wellness discounts up to 12.5% on renewal for healthy habits.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to No Age Limit | Children: 1 day to 25 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: ~₹5,000–₹9,000/year (Individual, 5L SI, Zone C) | Age 36-50: ~₹8,000–₹18,000/year | Age 50+: ~₹15,000–₹25,000+/year. Family floater discounts up to 32%, long-term discounts up to 10%, and salaried/young-family discounts further reduce premiums.
room_rent_capping_rules: Single Private AC Room
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to 10% of Sum Insured (max INR 1,00,000 per policy year) after 24 Months waiting; optional rider available to reduce waiting period to 12 Months. Includes delivery complications and first-year newborn vaccinations.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times per year for same or different illnesses (Restore Infinity Plus)
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered in base plan; available via optional Pocket Saver 2.0 Rider covering consultations, diagnostics, pharmacy, dental, vision, and unlimited tele-consultations.
consumables_cover_status: Yes - via Rider (Consumables Benefit Rider covers cotton, syringes, gloves, PPE, etc.)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Covered via optional Emergency Air Ambulance Rider for life-threatening transfers | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay)
no_claim_bonus_structure: 50% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a max of 100% OR 1% discount on renewal premium per claim-free year; only one option can be chosen. Bonus reduces by 50% upon claim.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available via optional Preventive Annual Health Check-up Rider from Year 1 through authorized service providers
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Not available in base plan; unlimited tele-consultations available via optional Pocket Saver 2.0 Rider through empaneled medical professionals
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured for surgery and medical expenses of the organ donor

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to No Limit | Children: 91 days to 30 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: ~INR 12,000 – 20,000 p.a. for 50L cover | Age 36-50: ~INR 25,000 – 40,000 p.a. for 50L cover | Age 50+: ~INR 45,000 – 70,000+ p.a. for 50L cover. Premium scales steeply with age; Platinum Infinite minimum SI is INR 50 Lakhs.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping. Actual room rent and boarding expenses covered up to Base Sum Insured.
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to INR 2,00,000 after 24 Months waiting for family floater combinations; 48 Months waiting for single adult policies. Includes pre-natal and post-natal check-ups.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times for same/different illnesses. ReInsure Benefit refills up to 100% of Base Sum Insured unlimited times in a policy year, triggered from the first claim itself. Optional Enhanced ReInsure extends refill up to 200% of Base Sum Insured.
opd_coverage_details: Covered up to INR 10,000 per single adult per year and up to INR 20,000 per family per year. Out-patient Dental/Vision covered up to INR 5,000 per family. Prescribed diagnostic tests for cancer-diagnosed patients covered up to INR 15,000 per policy.
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in. Claims Shield covers listed non-payable hospitalisation items including gloves, masks, cotton, bandages and other consumables.
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to INR 10,00,000 per policy year (domestic emergency evacuation only) | Global Cover: Yes - Medical Treatment Abroad covered for 16 listed illnesses/procedures after 36 Months waiting period.
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay). Optional voluntary co-payment of 10% or 20% available on payment of additional premium.
no_claim_bonus_structure: 50% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a maximum of 100% (Enhanced Cumulative Bonus). Additionally, Platinum Infinite exclusive Loyalty Credit grants 50% of Base Sum Insured per successive renewal irrespective of claim history, up to a maximum of 100%.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults up to INR 10,000 per policy year for preventive purposes.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Telemedicine consultations covered as part of inpatient hospitalisation. E-Opinion from panel Medical Practitioners available. Wellness Benefit includes A.I. Personal Fitness coaching, Dietician and Nutrition E-consultation, unlimited gym membership, and Walk Healthy renewal premium discount via mobile app.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured for organ donor's hospitalisation expenses for harvesting of the donated organ.

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 91 days to 25 years (unmarried, financially dependent)
premium_description: Age 20-35: ~₹7,500–₹21,000/year (5L–1Cr SI, individual) | Age 36-50: ~₹12,000–₹35,000/year | Age 50+: ~₹25,000–₹60,000+/year. Varies by SI, tenure, add-ons, and geography.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping - No sub-limits on room rent in base plan. Add-on available to opt for Single Private AC Room or Twin Sharing Room.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered in base plan. Add-on available: Covered up to INR 1,00,000 (5L SI) or INR 2,00,000 (10L+ SI) after 12 or 24 Months waiting. Available only for 3-year policy period. Female members aged 18-45 years.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% once per year for different illness only in base plan (not for same illness). Add-on 'Limitless Cover' provides 100% unlimited times for same/different illnesses.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered in base plan. Add-on available: Plan A (from 5L SI) - INR 10,000 to 20,000; Plan B (from 10L SI) - INR 25,000 to 50,000. Over and above Sum Insured.
consumables_cover_status: No in base plan. Yes - via Rider (Limitless Cover add-on includes consumables cover + unlimited restoration).
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Not covered in base plan. Add-on 'Smart Protector' covers Air Ambulance up to 7.5% of SI or INR 5,00,000 whichever is higher (SI < 1Cr), or 10% of SI (SI >= 1Cr), once per policy year, within India only. | Global Cover: Not covered in base plan. Add-on 'MoreGlobal' covers emergency and planned treatment abroad up to 100% of SI (sub-limit INR 50,00,000 or SI whichever is lower for planned inpatient).
copay_percentage: 0% mandatory co-pay on regular claims. 50% co-pay applicable on Special Treatments only in base plan. Voluntary 10% co-pay available via add-on.
no_claim_bonus_structure: No default NCB in base plan. Add-on 'Smart Protector' provides Super Charger: 20% or 33.33% increase in Sum Insured per year up to a max of 100%.
annual_health_checkup_terms: No - Not free. Stay Healthy Discount of up to 10% on renewal premium available if insured arranges and pays for annual health check-up (blood glucose, blood pressure, cholesterol, weight assessment) and submits results to insurer.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: No - Telemedicine is defined for claim-related consultations only. No free unlimited app-based tele-consultation offered.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured, No Sub-limits

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to Any age | Children: 91 days to 25 years
premium_description: Zone-based pricing (Zone A highest, Zone C lowest). Rough benchmark annual premium for INR 5 Lakh cover: Age 20-35 ~ INR 8,000–15,000 | Age 36-50 ~ INR 15,000–28,000 | Age 50+ ~ INR 28,000–50,000+. Varies by city tier, optional covers, and deductible/co-pay choices.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping / Any Room — built-in base cover allows any room category without extra charges. Optional Room Rent Modification available to restrict to Single Private AC Room, Shared Room, or General Ward.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered in base plan. Available via optional add-on: Option A — Covered up to INR 50,000/1,00,000 per delivery after 24 Months waiting; Option B — Covered up to INR 30,000 per delivery after 12 Months waiting; Option C — Assisted Reproduction Treatment cover. Newborn cover from Day 1 available as part of maternity optional cover with specified sub-limits.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes — 100% unlimited times for same and different illnesses. Automatic restoration triggers immediately after partial or full utilization of Sum Insured. Restored SI can be used for all claims including modern treatments, but for subsequent hospitalizations. Not applicable if Unlimited Sum Insured is opted.
opd_coverage_details: Limited OPD coverage. High-end Diagnostics covered up to INR 25,000 on OPD basis for specified tests (Brain Perfusion Imaging, CT Angiography, CT Urography, DSA, Liver Biopsy, MR Cholangiography, PET CT, PET MRI). Optional Operational Items (consultations) cover available. Standard outpatient doctor consultations and pharmacy not covered in base plan.
consumables_cover_status: Yes - via Rider / Optional Cover. Coverage for Non-medical Items (Consumables) available as an optional add-on, payable under an admissible In-patient / Day Care Treatment claim.
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to INR 5,00,000 per policy year, subject to an admissible hospitalization claim and on advice of treating medical practitioner. Global Cover: No — coverage is restricted to treatments taken in India only.
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) mandatory. Optional voluntary co-payment between 10% and 50% available. Optional Smart Network imposes 15% co-payment for treatments outside Smart Network hospitals (except accidents).
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network — 14,000+ network hospitals across India with strong Tier-2 and Tier-3 city presence. In-house claims team (no TPA).
no_claim_bonus_structure: 50% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a maximum of 100%. Optional Super Star Bonus (Guaranteed Bonus) provides additional 10% of expiring/renewed Annual Sum Insured at each renewal irrespective of claims, without maximum accumulation limit (not available for Unlimited Sum Insured).
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults. Up to 1% of Sum Insured or INR 25,000 (whichever is lower). Booking must be done through digital assets (Star Health App/website). Also includes preventive risk assessment and wellness activities.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited tele-consultations (audio/video/text) via Star Health Mobile App with General Practitioners, Specialists, Psychologists/Psychiatrists, and Dieticians & Nutritionists. AI-driven face scan for vitals (heart rate, SpO2, respiration rate) up to 2 times per month. Star Wellness Program offering up to 20% renewal premium discount via reward points. E-Domestic and E-International Second Medical Opinion available.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured (over and above the Sum Insured). Includes in-patient hospitalization expenses for organ transplantation from donor to recipient, donor screening expenses, and post-donation complications necessitating redo surgery/ICU admission up to 180 days from discharge.

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 75 years | Children: 91 days to 25 years (Daughter can continue as dependent up to 30 years if unmarried and/or unemployed)
premium_description: Age 20-35: Low to Moderate (~₹3,000–₹8,000/year for ₹5L–₹10L cover) | Age 36-50: Moderate to High (~₹8,000–₹18,000/year for ₹5L–₹10L cover) | Age 50+: High to Very High (~₹18,000–₹35,000+/year for ₹5L–₹10L cover). Premium varies by city, SI, and family composition. Online purchase attracts 5% discount; long-term (2-year) discount is 10%.
room_rent_capping_rules: Any category except suite and above for SI ≥ ₹10L; Single Private Room (non-suite) for SI ₹5L. Proportionate deductions apply for associated medical expenses based on eligible room category.
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to INR 50,000 per delivery (max 2 deliveries lifetime) after 12 Months waiting for SI ≥ ₹15L, or 24 Months waiting for SI ₹5L/₹10L. Includes pre-natal and post-natal expenses. Newborn covered from Day 1 up to ₹2,50,000 for 90 days (including congenital defects); up to 100% SI from subsequent year on payment of premium.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% once per year for same or different illnesses. Automatic restoration triggers immediately upon partial/full utilization of base SI + bonus. Unutilized restored amount cannot be carried forward.
opd_coverage_details: Covered up to INR 2,500 per policy year for female insured person (outpatient medical consultations). Unlimited Gynecologist consultations via Star Tele Health app.
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in. Non-medical items (gloves, PPE, surgical masks, etc.) covered subject to an admissible hospitalization claim.
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to 10% of Sum Insured per year (available for SI ≥ ₹10L only, domestic India only) | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay)
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network — 14,000+ cashless hospitals across India
no_claim_bonus_structure: 20% increase in Sum Insured per year from the 2nd claim-free year onwards, up to a maximum of 100% of base Sum Insured
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults. Preventive health check-up expenses covered up to specified limits per policy year.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited Gynecologist consultations via Star Tele Health app; general telehealth services (chat, voice, video) for second medical opinion and medical guidance; Digital Health Vault for personal health records; Star Wellness Program with premium discounts via Star Power app.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured (over and above the base Limit of Coverage). Donor complications necessitating redo surgery/ICU also covered.

entry_age_description: Adults: 61 years to Lifelong (No Upper Age Limit) | Children: Not Applicable
premium_description: Age 20-35: Not Applicable (Plan entry restricted to 61+ years) | Age 36-50: Not Applicable (Plan entry restricted to 61+ years) | Age 50+/Senior Band: INR 25,000 to INR 65,000+ annually for 5 Lakh cover (scales sharply with age and SI; indicative benchmarks: 61Y/F/5L ≈ ₹31,766; 63Y/F/7L ≈ ₹34,000/year; 66Y/M/10L ≈ ₹61,500/year)
room_rent_capping_rules: Single Private AC Room (Max. up to 1% of Sum Insured per day); ICU capped at 2% of Sum Insured per day
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% once per policy year (Automatic Recharge of Sum Insured up to base SI)
opd_coverage_details: Covered up to INR 5,000 or INR 10,000 via optional OPD rider (covers Doctor Consultation, Diagnostics & Pharmacy)
consumables_cover_status: No
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Not Covered | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 20% optional co-pay at age 61+ (waivable via Copayment Waiver add-on); additional 20% co-pay applicable for non-Smart Select network hospitals
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network (19,000+ to 21,700+ cashless healthcare providers)
no_claim_bonus_structure: 10% increase in Sum Insured per year; up to 150% of base SI with optional No Claim Bonus Super (accrued bonus reduces at same rate if claim is made)
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all insured persons
teleconsultation_digital_perks: No
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Capped at INR 50,000 for 3L SI | Capped at INR 1,00,000 for 5L/7L/10L SI

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to No Max Limit | Children: 3 months to 25 years
premium_description: Low-Moderate for Age 20-35 | Moderate for Age 36-50 | High for Age 50+ (Note: Plan does not offer 5 Lakh cover; minimum Sum Insured is INR 1 Crore. Premiums are dynamically priced based on zone, health assessment, and family composition, with competitive rates for young families)
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping - Any room of choice including Single Private AC Room, Deluxe Room; no ICU day/charge limits
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered (Hospitalisation costs related to childbirth, delivery, and pregnancy complications are excluded. Treatment for ectopic pregnancy and miscarriage due to accident is covered)
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times per policy year for different illnesses
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in (100% of hospital bills including non-medical consumables such as gloves, PPE kits, surgical masks, and syringes covered up to Sum Insured)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Not Covered | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay)
no_claim_bonus_structure: Not Covered (ACKO offers 'Inflation Protect' instead: 10% annual increase in Sum Insured regardless of claims, up to a max of 100% of Base Sum Insured)
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults aged above 18
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited via official ACKO app (GPs and specialists)
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured (All surgery and hospitalisation expenses of the donor covered)

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to No Maximum Age Limit | Children: 91 days to 23 years (under Family Floater); beyond 23 years must be covered under an Individual policy
premium_description: Age 20-35 (5L SI): ~INR 4,750 - 5,500 annually (Individual, Zone 1) | Age 36-50 (5L SI): ~INR 6,050 - 8,500 annually (Individual, Zone 1) | Age 50+ (5L SI): ~INR 12,000 - 35,000+ annually (scales sharply with age). Family Floater (2A+2K) at 5L SI adds ~40-60% over individual base. Premium varies by Zone, SI, tenure (7.5% discount for 2-year, 10% for 3-year), and optional covers.
room_rent_capping_rules: Base Plan: Hospital Room capped at 2% of Sum Insured per day, maximum INR 3,000 | ICU capped at 4% of Sum Insured per day, maximum INR 7,000. Optional Cover Available: Removal of Room Rent Limit (up to Single Private AC Room) on payment of additional premium.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% of opted Sum Insured restored once per policy year for unrelated illnesses only. Not available for claims related to the same illness/disease/injury already claimed in the current policy year. Not available for Sum Insured of INR 0.5 Lacs and INR 1 Lacs.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered as base benefit. Optional Health Maintenance Benefit (HMB) available under ProHealth Select (A): INR 500 / INR 2,000 / INR 15,000 per policy year. ManipalCigna Health 360 OPD rider also available as add-on (Package 1: Doctor consultations | Package 2: Consultations + Diagnostics | Package 3: Consultations + Diagnostics + Pharmacy).
consumables_cover_status: No
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Not Covered as base benefit. Available via ManipalCigna Health 360 Advance add-on rider. Global Cover: Not Covered.
copay_percentage: 0% mandatory co-pay for ages below 65 years | 20% mandatory co-pay for all insured persons aged 65 years and above (waivable via optional rider). Optional voluntary co-pay of 10% or 20% available under ProHealth Select (A). Additional zone-based co-pay applies for out-of-zone treatments (10% or 20%).
no_claim_bonus_structure: Base: 5% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free policy year, maximum up to 100% of base Sum Insured (not reduced on claim). Optional Cumulative Bonus Booster: 10%, 25%, or 50% per year up to maximum 100% or 200% of base Sum Insured.
annual_health_checkup_terms: No
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Available via ManipalCigna ProActiv app. Wellness programs include Health Risk Assessment, Lifestyle Management Program, Chronic Condition Management Program, and doctor teleconsultations. Healthy Rewards: 1% of premium paid as reward points + up to 10% additional for program completion, redeemable against premium, HMB, or network services.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured for harvesting the organ from a donor for transplant into the insured, subject to admissibility of the insured's inpatient hospitalization claim and compliance with the Transplantation of Human Organs Act 1994.

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to No Maximum Age Limit | Children: 91 days to 30 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: Low-to-Moderate (approx. INR 4,000 - 10,000 p.a. for 5L SI, Zone 4) | Age 36-50: Moderate (approx. INR 10,000 - 20,000 p.a. for 5L SI) | Age 50+: High (approx. INR 20,000 - 40,000+ p.a. for 5L SI). Premiums are zone-based (4 zones) and vary by SI, cover type, and optional riders selected.
room_rent_capping_rules: Single Private AC Room (ICU covered up to Sum Insured). Optional Room Rent Modification rider available to upgrade to any room category including Suite, or downgrade to Twin Sharing AC Room.
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to 20% of Base Sum Insured or max INR 5 Lakh (whichever is lower) after 36 Months waiting period. New Born hospitalization and first-year vaccination covered within maternity limit. Optional cover in Uttam and Param variants.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times for same/different illnesses (triggers from 2nd claim onwards in a policy year). Optional in Uttam/Pratham; Base cover in Param.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered. Base plan excludes OPD treatment and diagnostics. Unlimited Tele-Consultation with General Physician and Network Provider discounts on pharmacy/diagnostics are available as value-added services.
consumables_cover_status: Yes - via Rider/Optional Cover. Non-Medical items covered up to Sum Insured; Durable Medical Equipment covered up to INR 1 Lac.
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to Sum Insured subject to max INR 10 Lacs (Optional Rider, in addition to Base SI) | Global Cover: No (Treatment outside India is excluded under Sarvah)
copay_percentage: 0% (No mandatory co-pay). Voluntary co-payment options of 10%, 20%, or 30% available for premium reduction.
no_claim_bonus_structure: Gullak (Guaranteed Cumulative Bonus): 100% of Base Sum Insured per year up to max 1,500% irrespective of claim history | No Claim Discount: 2.5% (1 year), 5% (2 years), 7.5% (3 years) on renewal premium for claim-free years.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults aged 18+. Optional cover in Uttam/Pratham (network-only, cashless basis); Base cover in Param.
pre_post_hospitalization_days: 90 Days Pre / 180 Days Post (for insured). Donor pre/post hospitalization: 30 Days each.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited Tele-consultation with General Physician via official app during the Policy Year. Wellness Program rewards up to 20% premium discount. Network Provider discounts on pharmacy, diagnostics, and health supplements. Digital premium discounts available (website, early renewal, standing instruction, family).
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured. Includes donor pre/post hospitalization (30 days each), donor screening cost once per policy year, and complications arising during hospitalization or up to 30 days post-discharge covered up to 25% of Base Sum Insured subject to max INR 2 Lacs (over and above Base SI).

entry_age_description: Adults: 21 to 65 years | Children: 91 days to 21 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: ~INR 4,500–9,000/year for 1 Cr SI | Age 36-50: ~INR 10,000–18,000/year for 1 Cr SI | Age 50+: ~INR 20,000–35,000+/year for 1 Cr SI. Premiums vary by city tier, variant (Classic/Premium), and add-ons.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping - Single Private AC Room default on Classic; Any room except Suite on Premium
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times for same illness per policy year
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in on Premium plan only (via Claim Protector covering IRDAI non-payable items up to SI)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Covered up to Sum Insured (Premium plan only) | Global Cover: Yes - up to INR 3 Crore after 24-month waiting period (Premium only, age up to 65)
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay)
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network (7,000+ hospitals with Anywhere Cashless service; extendable to virtually any hospital on request)
no_claim_bonus_structure: 20% increase in Sum Insured per year up to a maximum of 100% (Guaranteed Loyalty Bonus on continuous renewal, not claim-dependent)
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 up to INR 10,000 (Premium plan only)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited 24x7 via official ILTakeCare app (GP and specialist consultations)
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 91 days to 25 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: ~INR 2,900-4,600/year for 5L cover (individual) | Age 36-50: ~INR 5,500-9,500/year for 5L cover | Age 50+: ~INR 12,000-24,000/year for 5L cover. Premium scales significantly with age and sum insured. Family floater premiums for 30M+29F+1Child: ~INR 4,800/year (5L), ~INR 6,500/year (10L), ~INR 9,100/year (1Cr).
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping for SI ≥ INR 5 Lakhs | Capped at 1% of SI per day for SI ≤ INR 4 Lakhs | Single Private AC Room definition applies
maternity_benefit_details: Optional Cover - Covered up to 10% of Sum Insured (max INR 1 Lakh) after 24 Months waiting period. Applicable for insured females aged 18 to 45 years. Newborn cover up to 2x maternity limit.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% of Annual Sum Insured. For SI < INR 10 Lakhs: once per policy year for same/different illness. For SI ≥ INR 10 Lakhs: unlimited times per policy year for same/different illness.
opd_coverage_details: Available via optional BeFit rider / wellness points redemption on IL TakeCare app. Covers OPD consultations, pharmacy, diagnostics. Not a built-in base cover.
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in for SI ≥ INR 15 Lakhs (Claim Protector) | Yes - via Rider for SI < INR 15 Lakhs
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Covered up to Sum Insured (domestic emergency evacuation) | Global Cover: Yes - available for SI ≥ INR 25 Lakhs with 2-year waiting period (45 consecutive days per trip, 90 days cumulative per policy year)
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) | Optional 10% or 20% co-pay available for premium discount
no_claim_bonus_structure: Guaranteed Cumulative Bonus: 20% increase in Sum Insured per year irrespective of claim history, up to a maximum of 100% of base Sum Insured
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults aged 18+ (up to 0.5% of Annual Sum Insured, max INR 10,000 per policy year on reimbursement/cashless basis). Applicable for SI ≥ INR 10 Lakhs.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited 24x7 tele-consultations via phone/video via IL TakeCare app. Wellness points program (1 point = INR 0.25) redeemable for OPD, pharmacy, diagnostics.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured, provided the organ donor hospitalization claim is accepted

entry_age_description: Adults: 60 to 75 years | Children: Not Applicable (minimum entry age is 60 years)
premium_description: Not Applicable — Plan restricted to ages 60-75. Premium is sum-insured based and remains constant across all age brackets within the eligible range. Indicative annual premiums (1-year term, excluding tax): ₹1L SI ~₹11,590 | ₹5L SI ~₹20,315 | ₹10L SI ~₹25,030 | ₹25L SI ~₹36,080 (Individual); Floater (2A) ₹10L SI ~₹40,050 | ₹25L SI ~₹57,730.
room_rent_capping_rules: SI ₹1L-₹5L: Up to 1% of Sum Insured per day | SI ₹7.5L-₹10L: Up to INR 6,000 per day | SI ₹15L: Up to INR 7,500 per day | SI ₹20L: Up to INR 8,500 per day | SI ₹25L: Up to INR 10,000 per day. Proportionate deduction applies if higher room is opted
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: No
opd_coverage_details: Covered at Network Hospitals only — INR 200 per consultation cap. Annual limits: Individual Basis: INR 600 (₹3L SI) to INR 2,600 (₹25L SI) | Floater Basis: INR 1,400 per person / INR 2,400 per policy (₹10L SI) to INR 2,600 per person / INR 4,400 per policy (₹25L SI)
consumables_cover_status: No
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Covered (up to limits for immediate emergency transport) | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 30% mandatory co-pay on all claims | 50% co-pay on claims related to Pre-Existing Diseases
no_claim_bonus_structure: Not Available — No increase in Sum Insured for claim-free years under this plan
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes — Available for every claim-free year up to limits: ₹1,000 (₹5L-₹7.5L SI) | ₹2,000 (₹10L-₹15L SI) | ₹2,500 (₹20L-₹25L SI) per person, at network hospitals only
pre_post_hospitalization_days: 30 Days Pre / Post-hospitalization covered as lump-sum benefit equivalent to 7% of hospitalization expenses subject to caps: INR 5,000 (₹1L-₹7.5L SI) | INR 7,000 (₹10L-₹15L SI) | INR 10,000 (₹20L-₹25L SI)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: No — Not covered as a policy-specific benefit. Free teleconsultation available via Star Health mobile app as a general wellness service
organ_donor_expenses_rules: No — Not Covered

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to No Limit | Children: 91 days to No Limit (Critical Illness cover max entry age 65 years)
premium_description: Age 20-35: INR 3,000 - 6,000 p.a. for 5L SI | Age 36-50: INR 5,000 - 10,000 p.a. for 5L SI | Age 50+: INR 8,000 - 15,000+ p.a. for 5L SI (highly variant-dependent on chosen covers, zone, and waiting periods)
room_rent_capping_rules: Customizable: No Limit OR 1% / 1.5% / 2% of Sum Insured per day; Inbuilt Daily Cash reward for choosing shared accommodation
maternity_benefit_details: Covered as optional cover up to opted Section Sum Insured; Waiting period customizable from No waiting period to 48 Months; Limited to max 2 living children
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% Sum Insured Refill for Accidental & Illness Hospitalization per policy period for unrelated hospitalizations; Number of refills limited as per policy schedule
opd_coverage_details: Covered as optional cover (Section 8) up to opted Sum Insured; Basis 1 (co-payment applicable until 2nd renewal) or Basis 2 available
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in (drugs, medicines, consumables under base hospitalization) + Yes - via Rider (Payment of Non-Medical Expenses optional cover at 1%/2%/5%/10% of approved claim amount)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered as optional cover up to opted Sum Insured (Section 5; available only where base SI exceeds INR 3 Lakhs) | Global Cover: Optional (outside India on payment of additional premium)
copay_percentage: 0% (No mandatory age/zone co-pay); Optional network hospital co-payment rider available; OPD Basis 1 co-payment applicable until 2nd continuous renewal
no_claim_bonus_structure: Multiple customizable options: 5%/10%/20%/50%/100% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year, accruing up to max 25%/50%/100%/150%/200% respectively; Alternative: 50% per year up to 100% max; Reduces by same percentage if claim is made (unless Cumulative Bonus Protection Cover opted)
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Complimentary Health Check Up up to 0.25%/0.5% of Sum Insured (excluding cumulative bonus), max INR 5,000 per policy
pre_post_hospitalization_days: 30 Days Pre / 60 Days Post OR 60 Days Pre / 180 Days Post (depending on plan variant opted)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Doctor on Call via Wellness Benefit Program (Section 16; choose 12 services from doctor on call, wellness coach, lab services, pharmacy services, home care, medical wallet, etc.); Fully digital claim process with no hard-copy document submission
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured; Donor's Pre and Post Hospitalization expenses capped at 5% of admissible harvesting expenses

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years and above | Children: 91 days and above
premium_description: Age 20-35: Low/Moderate (~INR 6,400 - INR 7,700 p.a. for INR 10 Lakh individual cover) | Age 36-50: Moderate/High (~INR 9,800 - INR 14,900 p.a. for INR 10 Lakh individual cover) | Age 50+: High/Very High (~INR 18,500 - INR 33,700+ p.a. for INR 10 Lakh individual cover). Family floater premiums scale proportionally.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times for same and different illnesses
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered
consumables_cover_status: No (Yes - via Consumables Cover add-on)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to Sum Insured (emergencies only) | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay)
no_claim_bonus_structure: 50% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a maximum of 100%
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults, up to 0.25% of Sum Insured (max INR 1,500) per policy
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited free teleconsultations with General Physicians via official Digit app; up to 80% off on health checks and diagnostics; up to 23% off on medicine orders; free 21-day yoga and mindfulness sessions
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 16 days to 25 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: Low-Moderate (approx. INR 12,500-16,500/year for 5-10L family floater) | Age 36-50: Moderate-High (approx. INR 18,000-28,000/year for 5-10L family floater) | Age 50+: High (approx. INR 35,000-55,000+/year for 5-10L family floater). Premium varies by zone, family size, and sum insured.
room_rent_capping_rules: SI 1L-2L: Up to INR 2,000/day | SI 3L-4L: Up to INR 5,000/day | SI 5L and above: Single Standard A/C Room without sub-limits. Proportionate deductions apply for associated medical expenses based on eligible room category.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered as standalone maternity. However, Newborn Baby coverage starts from 16th day after birth up to 10% of SI or INR 50,000 (whichever is less) if mother is insured continuously for 12 months. Assisted Reproduction Treatment covered up to INR 1,00,000 (SI 5L) or INR 2,00,000 (SI 10L+) after 36 months waiting.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% of Basic Sum Insured restored up to 3 times per policy year for unrelated illnesses only. Available for SI INR 3,00,000 and above. Cannot be carried forward. Recharge Benefit also available once per policy period (INR 75,000 for SI 3L, INR 1L for SI 4L, INR 1.5L for SI 5L-25L) for same or different illnesses.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered as standalone OPD. Unlimited Tele-Consultation available via Star Health mobile app. Preventive Health Check-up available from Year 1 for SI 3L and above (Package A for SI 3L-10L, Package B for SI 15L-25L).
consumables_cover_status: No - Not covered in base policy. Yes - via Star Extra Protect Add-on Cover (Section I) which covers non-medical/consumable expenses.
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to 10% of Basic Sum Insured per policy period for SI INR 5,00,000 and above | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) for entry age below 61 years | 20% mandatory co-pay for entry age 61 years and above on every claim amount
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network (14,000+ network hospitals across India including Tier-2 and Tier-3 cities)
no_claim_bonus_structure: Loyalty Bonus: 25% increase in Sum Insured in the 2nd year, then 10% per subsequent claim-free year up to a maximum of 100% of Basic Sum Insured. Available for SI INR 3,00,000 and above. Bonus available irrespective of claim if renewed timely.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults for SI INR 3,00,000 and above. Package A for SI 3L-10L, Package B for SI 15L-25L. Can be availed once per policy year per adult insured through Star Health mobile app or toll-free number.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited Tele-Consultation via official Star Health mobile app and digital platforms. AI-driven Face Scan available up to 2 times per month per insured person. Star Wellness Program with reward points earning up to 20% premium discount. E-Domestic Second Medical Opinion available.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to 10% of Sum Insured or INR 1,00,000 (whichever is less) where insured is the recipient. Donor screening expenses and post-donation complications not payable.

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 91 days to 25 years (children 91 days to 5 years only when both parents are insured). No maximum cover ceasing age.
premium_description: Age 20-35: Low-to-Moderate (approx. INR 5,000-8,000/year for 5L SI Individual) | Age 36-50: Moderate (approx. INR 8,000-15,000/year for 5L SI Individual) | Age 50+: High (approx. INR 15,000-30,000+/year for 5L SI Individual). Family floater discounts: 2 members -20%, 3 members -28%, >3 members -32%. Long-term discounts: 2 years -5%, 3 years -10%.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping. Single Private AC Room covered without sub-limits on room rent.
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to INR 50,000 (INR 60,000 for birth of girl child) for lower Sum Insured; up to INR 1,00,000 (INR 1,20,000 for birth of girl child) for higher Sum Insured, after 48 Months waiting period. Delivery complications covered up to INR 10,000-25,000. First-year vaccinations up to INR 10,000 (INR 15,000 for girl child).
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% of base Sum Insured once per policy year. For SI up to INR 50L: 1 restoration per year. For SI INR 75L and above: 1 restoration per year for multi-year policies; multiple restorations allowed during policy period for single-premium multi-year policies (except first claim). Restored SI usable for unrelated illness after 45 days from discharge, or for other insured persons immediately.
opd_coverage_details: Covered after 2 years continuous coverage. General OPD: Up to INR 5,000-20,000 per policy year (varies by SI). Dental OPD: Up to INR 10,000-25,000 per policy year (varies by SI). High-end diagnostics (OPD): Up to INR 25,000-50,000 per policy year.
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in. Covers specified non-medical consumables listed in Annexure I (List I - Optional Items) consumed during hospitalization directly related to medical/surgical treatment. Excludes personal comfort items, toiletries, cosmetics, external durable devices.
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to INR 5,00,000 for out-of-network; up to Sum Insured within network. Global Cover: Yes - covers planned hospitalization outside India up to Sum Insured (diagnosis must be made in India). For SI above INR 50Lacs, visa expenses for medical treatment abroad also covered. Reimbursement basis only.
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay)
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network (7,000+ to 11,000+ cashless hospitals across India)
no_claim_bonus_structure: 50% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a maximum of 100% of base SI. Alternatively, policyholder can opt for No Claim Discount: 1% discount on renewal premium per claim-free year (instead of cumulative bonus). Bonus reduces by 50% if claim is made.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults. Up to 1% of policy Sum Insured subject to maximum limit (varies by SI tier). Separate limit over and above base SI; does not affect cumulative bonus. Per policy for floater; per insured person for individual.
pre_post_hospitalization_days: 60 Days Pre / 90 Days Post for Sum Insured up to INR 50 Lakhs. 60 Days Pre / 200 Days Post for Sum Insured INR 75 Lakhs to 3 Crores. Post-hospitalization includes up to 15 physiotherapy sessions at home for SI 75L+.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited Teleconsultation (General Physician and Specialist) via official Tata AIG app. Additional digital perks: Ambulance booking facility, Emergency Help Me feature (alerts designated caregiver), Health Condition Management programs (Diet & Weight, Stress Management), redeemable wellness vouchers/discounts.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured. Medical and surgical expenses of the organ donor for harvesting the organ where insured person is the recipient, subject to compliance with Transplantation of Human Organs Act and admissibility of inpatient claim.

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 91 days to 25 years
premium_description: Age 20-35 (5L cover): ~INR 13,000 - 17,000/year (Standard/Low) | Age 36-50 (5L cover): ~INR 16,000 - 32,000/year (Moderate) | Age 50+ (5L cover): ~INR 36,000 - 59,000/year (High). Family floater premiums scale significantly higher. Zone 1 (metros) pricing is higher than Zone 2.
room_rent_capping_rules: Variant-dependent: Pro Plan (INR 3L-5L): Single Private AC Room (1% of base SI cap optional for INR 3L-4L plans) | Plus Plan (INR 6L-20L): Single Private AC Room | Premium Plan (INR 25L+): No Capping (Actuals up to Sum Insured)
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% once per policy year for same or different illnesses after partial/complete exhaustion of base Sum Insured and Cumulative Bonus
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered for general OPD consultations, pharmacy and diagnostics. Limited OPD coverage available for dental/ophthalmic treatments and oral chemotherapy only. E-Opinion benefit provided as alternative.
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Pro Plan - Not Covered | Plus Plan - Up to INR 5,00,000 | Premium Plan - Up to INR 10,00,000 (Reimbursement basis) | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) mandatory; Optional 10% or 20% co-pay available as add-on for premium discount
no_claim_bonus_structure: 15% increase in Sum Insured per year up to a max of 100% of Basic Sum Insured. Optional Enhanced Cumulative Bonus add-on available (up to 200%)
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from 1st renewal year for all adults, irrespective of claim history in the previous policy year
pre_post_hospitalization_days: Variant-dependent: Pro Plan - 30 Days Pre / 60 Days Post | Plus Plan - 60 Days Pre / 90 Days Post | Premium Plan - 60 Days Pre / 180 Days Post
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Telemedicine consultation fees covered during hospitalization; E-Opinion benefit available (4/4/Unlimited per policy year by Pro/Plus/Premium variant)
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to No Capping | Children: 91 days to 25 years (Family Floater) / 5 years to 25 years (Individual)
premium_description: Age 20-35: ~₹6,000–₹8,600/year for ₹5L cover | Age 36-50: ~₹8,200–₹14,200/year for ₹5L cover | Age 50+: ~₹14,500–₹24,000+/year for ₹5L cover. Premiums vary by zone, sum insured, and family composition.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping - Any category room (Single Private, Shared, Deluxe) covered up to Base Sum Insured. Optional add-on available to restrict to Single Private Room or Shared Accommodation.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered. Maternity expenses including childbirth, miscarriage (unless accidental), and lawful termination are permanently excluded from base NXT. A separate Activ One Maternity combo/rider is available via select aggregators only.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - Super Reload 2X Cover from Day 1: 100% of Base Sum Insured reinstated unlimited times during the policy year for both same and different illnesses, up to Base Sum Insured per claim.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered in base plan. Chronic Management Program (OPD consultations and diagnostics for listed chronic PEDs) available as optional add-on only.
consumables_cover_status: No - Non-medical items (gloves, PPE, surgical masks, etc.) excluded unless Claim Protect optional cover is purchased.
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Not Covered in base plan (available as optional add-on only). Global Cover: No.
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) for Sum Insured ≥₹4 Lakhs. For Sum Insured ≤₹3 Lakhs: 10%-25% zone-based co-pay applies. Additional 10% co-pay at non-PPN hospitals if PPN Discount optional cover is opted.
no_claim_bonus_structure: No built-in No-Claim Bonus in NXT. Super Credit optional cover provides 100% increase in Sum Insured per year up to a maximum of 500% (capped at ₹3 Crores under this benefit), irrespective of claims history.
annual_health_checkup_terms: No - Not included in base NXT. Available as optional cover only. Basic Health Assessment wellness check is provided once per policy year under the in-built Health Management Program.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: No - Not included in base plan. Tele-OPD Consultation (unlimited e-consultations with General Physicians) available as optional add-on. Chronic Management Program add-on includes e-consultations for listed chronic conditions.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Base Sum Insured

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 91 days to 25 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: ₹40,000 – ₹80,000/year | Age 36-50: ₹80,000 – ₹1,50,000/year | Age 50+: ₹1,50,000 – ₹2,50,000+/year (indicative for standard Global Cover; varies by sum insured, zone, and India Cover option)
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping - Single Private AC Room and above covered without sub-limits
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times for same and different illnesses (Unlimited Reinstatement of base sum insured)
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered under base Global Cover; Covered under India + Global option
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in (covered within sum insured)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered under India + Global option up to Sum Insured | Global Cover: Yes - Up to USD 1 Million
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) for standard entry ages; 20% mandatory co-pay for Senior Citizens unless waived via add-on
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network + Worldwide Cashless Network (7 lakh+ medical specialists access)
no_claim_bonus_structure: 25% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a max of 50% (India Cover); Cumulative Bonus applicable for Global Cover
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults under India + Global option
pre_post_hospitalization_days: Global Cover: 15 Days Pre / 30 Days Post | India Cover: 90 Days Pre / 180 Days Post
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Tele-consultation, health check-up booking, nurse-at-home arrangement via official app and assistance services
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured under India Cover; Excluded under base Global Cover

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 91 days to 25 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: INR 3,000 - 7,000/year | Age 36-50: INR 5,000 - 12,000/year | Age 50+: INR 12,000 - 25,000+/year (indicative for INR 5 Lakhs SI; premiums scale non-linearly with age and SI)
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping (Single Private A/C Room)
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to INR 15,000 - 1,00,000 (depending on Sum Insured and delivery type: Normal/Caesarean) after 24 Months waiting; maximum 2 deliveries per lifetime; newborn cover and vaccination expenses included with sub-limits
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% once per year for all claims (same or different illnesses); not available for Modern Treatment
opd_coverage_details: Out-patient medical consultations covered up to INR 1,200 - 5,000 per policy period (per-consultation cap INR 300); Dental and Ophthalmic OPD covered up to INR 5,000 - 15,000 per block of 3 continuous years
consumables_cover_status: No
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to INR 2,50,000 per hospitalization, maximum INR 5,00,000 per policy year | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) for entry age below 61 years | 10% mandatory co-pay for entry age 61 years and above
no_claim_bonus_structure: 50% of basic Sum Insured per claim-free year for lower SI variants; 100% per claim-free year for SI of INR 7.5 Lakhs and above; both capped at maximum 100% of basic Sum Insured
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available as per opted Sum Insured package tier (Package A for SI INR 5L-10L, Package B for above INR 10L)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited tele-consultations via Star Health mobile app/digital platforms; AI-driven face scan up to 2 times per month per insured person; wellness reward points for premium discounts up to 10%
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to basic Sum Insured (over and above the base coverage limit, usable only by the donor)

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 91 days to 25 years (children between 91 days and 5 years only if either parent is covered under the policy)
premium_description: Age 20-35: approx INR 3,000 to 9,000/year for 5 Lakhs SI | Age 36-50: approx INR 9,000 to 18,000/year for 5 Lakhs SI | Age 50+: approx INR 18,000 to 35,000+/year for 5 Lakhs SI (varies by city tier, SI, and underwriting)
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping (Any category room covered up to Sum Insured)
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered in base plan. Available via optional Parenthood Add-on rider after 24 Months waiting
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% of Basic Sum Insured once per Policy Year for same or different illnesses. Optional Unlimited Restore Benefit available for unlimited restorations
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in (covered under In-patient Treatment up to Sum Insured)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to INR 2.5 Lakhs per hospitalization for SI ≥10 Lakhs | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay). Optional Co-payment rider available if opted
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network (15,000+ empaneled hospitals and diagnostic centers across 632 districts)
no_claim_bonus_structure: 50% increase in Basic Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a maximum of 100% (Multiplier Benefit). Reduces by 50% of Basic SI in the year following a claim, but never below Basic SI
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for SI ≥10 Lakhs (up to INR 2,000-5,000 per insured person); Available once every 2 continuous years for SI 5 Lakhs; Not Applicable for SI 3 Lakhs
teleconsultation_digital_perks: No (E-Opinion for Critical Illness is available; dedicated mobile app provides wellness/step-count discounts up to 8% on renewal)
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 91 days to 30 years (Family Floater) / 91 days to 65 years (Family First)
premium_description: Age 20-35: Silver ₹8,000–12,000 / Gold ₹16,000–17,000 / Platinum ₹52,000+ (for 10L SI). Age 36-50: Silver ₹11,500–17,000 / Gold ₹22,000–23,000 / Platinum ₹63,000+. Age 50+: Silver ₹20,000–28,000 / Gold ₹35,000–36,000 / Platinum ₹94,000+. Premiums scale steeply with age and variant; Platinum is 3–5x Gold pricing.
room_rent_capping_rules: Silver & Gold: No Capping — covered up to Sum Insured except suite and above room category. Platinum: No Capping — no limit on any room category including suites
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to INR 60,000 (Silver) / INR 100,000 (Gold) / INR 200,000 (Platinum) after 24 Months waiting. Not available under Individual Policy. Platinum covers worldwide excluding USA & Canada. Maximum 2 pregnancies or terminations per lifetime of policy
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes — 100% unlimited times for same and different illnesses (Re-fill Benefit). Base Sum Insured is reinstated when exhausted in the same policy year
opd_coverage_details: Platinum: Covered up to INR 50,000 per policy (individual/family floater) or INR 35,000 (family first). Gold: Limited OPD under international coverage. Silver: Not Covered
consumables_cover_status: Yes — via Rider (optional Safeguard / Safeguard+ add-on covers all non-payable items / consumables as per defined lists)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Covered up to Sum Insured (domestic emergency assistance within India) | Global Cover: Yes — Platinum up to INR 1 Crore per insured person (worldwide excluding USA & Canada, max 45 days per trip); Gold up to INR 30 Lakhs (max 15 days per trip); Silver: Not Covered
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) for Zone 1 coverage. 20% mandatory co-pay for Zone 2 coverage in Mumbai, Delhi NCR, Kolkata & Gujarat. 20% co-pay on international OPD claims under Platinum
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network — 10,000+ empaneled hospitals across 31 states with Cashless Everywhere facility
no_claim_bonus_structure: 10% increase in Base Sum Insured per policy year regardless of claim history (Loyalty Additions), up to a maximum of 100% of Base Sum Insured. Optional Enhanced Loyalty: 20% per year up to max 200%
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes — Available from Year 1 for all insured persons. Test worth varies by SI: INR 1,250 (5L) to INR 10,000 (50L+)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes — Unlimited tele / online e-Consultations via official app. Health Coach available for 90 days per policy year (optional). Pharmacy & diagnostic services available through empanelled service provider
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes — Covered up to Sum Insured for living organ donor transplant (in-patient treatment for harvesting of organ)

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 91 days to 65 years (Newborn covered from Day 1 under M-iracle maternity benefit)
premium_description: Age 20-35: Moderate-to-High (estimated ₹8,000–₹18,000/year for 5L SI, variant dependent); Age 36-50: High (estimated ₹15,000–₹30,000/year); Age 50+: Very High (estimated ₹28,000–₹55,000+/year). Lock the Clock freezes renewal premium at entry-age rate until first claim, making early purchase advantageous.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping - Any category room covered up to Sum Insured for normal hospitalisation and ICU (15% co-pay may apply if higher than standard single private room is chosen in select network tiers)
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to M-iracle Sum Insured (separate limit over and above Base SI) after waiting period: 48 Months (Gold+), 24 Months (Diamond+), or 9 Months (Platinum+ / Titanium+). Covers delivery, IVF, adoption, and surrogacy. Newborn baby covered from Day 1 if maternity claim is paid or M-iracle waiting period is served.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times for same or different illnesses after the first claim (ReAssure+ / ReAssure Forever). Each restored claim is limited to Base Sum Insured amount.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered as built-in; Yes - via WellConsult add-on: Unlimited tele-consultations, Physical consultations up to INR 10,000/year, Diagnostics up to INR 10,000/year, Pharmacy up to INR 2,500/year (20% co-pay on reimbursement claims)
consumables_cover_status: Yes - via Safeguard+ Rider (add-on) which covers non-payable items (List I, II, III, IV); No built-in consumables coverage
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to Sum Insured for emergency domestic evacuation | Global Cover: Yes - via Borderless add-on (international treatment coverage)
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) for Tiered Network hospitals; 20% mandatory co-pay if treatment taken in non-Tiered Network Hospital. Optional co-pay rider available for premium reduction. WellConsult OPD add-on has 20% co-pay on reimbursement.
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network (10,000+ empaneled hospitals across 31 states)
no_claim_bonus_structure: Booster+ benefit (instead of traditional NCB): Unutilised Base Sum Insured carries forward annually — Entry Age 18-35: up to 10X (Platinum+/Titanium+), up to 5X (Diamond+), up to 3X (Gold+); Entry Age 36-45: up to 5X / 3X / 2X; Entry Age 46+: up to 3X / 2X / 1X. Cash-Bag add-on: 10% cashback on 1st renewal, 5% on subsequent renewals.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults aged 18+; Cashless only via pre-booking on official app. Up to INR 500 for every INR 1 Lakh of Base Sum Insured (Max INR 5,000 per person for Individual; Max INR 10,000 per policy for Family Floater)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited tele & video consultations with general physicians via official app (built-in); WellConsult add-on expands to physical consultations, diagnostics, pharmacy, gym access (2 days/week per adult), unlimited fitness coach & diet-nutrition sessions, 10 cashless emotional wellness sessions, and Live Healthy discount up to 30% on renewal via step tracking
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured (covers medical expenses for both organ recipient and organ donor harvesting)

entry_age_description: Adults: 5 years to Lifelong | Children: 91 days to 24 years (Floater requires at least 1 member aged 18+)
premium_description: Age 20-35: Low-Moderate (₹6,620-₹8,000 annually for ₹5L individual cover) | Age 36-50: Moderate-High (₹7,200-₹12,792 annually for ₹5L individual cover) | Age 50+: High (₹12,792+ annually for ₹5L individual cover). Premiums scale significantly with sum insured options (₹25L/50L/1Cr/2Cr/3Cr/6Cr) and zone-based pricing (Zone 1: Metro cities highest, Zone 2: Tier 2 cities moderate, Zone 3: Tier 3 cities lowest).
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping (No Sub-limit on Room Rent/ICU Charges). Optional 'Room Rent Modification' add-on restricts to Single Private Room category.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered. Maternity expenses including childbirth, complicated deliveries, caesarean sections, miscarriage (unless due to accident), and lawful medical termination of pregnancy are permanently excluded under Code-Excl18.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% Automatic Recharge once per Policy Year. Base sum insured is reinstated (including for same person, same disease) after complete exhaustion of base SI, NCB, and NCB Super. Optional 'Unlimited Automatic Recharge' add-on provides unlimited restorations.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered as base benefit. Optional 'Care OPD' add-on covers 4 general physician consultations + 4 specialist consultations (from 14 specified specialists) with maximum reimbursement of ₹500 per consultation. 'Unlimited E-Consultations' with general physicians available via official app as built-in benefit (or via Protect Plus add-on depending on variant).
consumables_cover_status: No (Not covered in base plan). Yes - via Rider (Claim Shield add-on covers 68+ non-medical items; Claim Shield Plus covers 140+ non-payable items including gloves, PPE kits, masks, syringes, admission kits, etc.)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Covered up to INR 5 Lakhs via Optional Cover (Air Ambulance Cover add-on). Global Cover: Optional via 'Protect Plus' add-on - offers worldwide coverage excluding USA/Canada/India or worldwide excluding India only. Mandatory inclusive basis for 2Cr/3Cr/6Cr sum insured options.
copay_percentage: 20% mandatory co-pay applies to all claims for insured members with entry age above 60 years (unless Co-Payment Waiver add-on is purchased). Optional Co-Payment of 5%/10%/15%/20% can be chosen by members below 61 years to reduce premiums. Smart Select add-on imposes additional 20% co-pay for non-listed hospitals.
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network (21,700+ cashless healthcare providers across India including metro cities, tier 2 and tier 3 cities)
annual_health_checkup_terms: FY 2026: 96.99%. IRDAI reported 92.77% for claims settled within 3 months in FY 2023-24.
pre_post_hospitalization_days: 10% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year, up to a maximum of 50% of base SI (accumulated over 5 consecutive years). Optional 'No Claims Bonus Super' add-on provides 50% increase per claim-free year, up to a maximum of 100% of base SI. Bonus reduces at same rate if claim is made.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Available as Optional Cover (Annual Health Check-up add-on). Available from Year 1 for all adults aged 18+ (tests vary by SI: up to ₹75L includes CBC, ESR, Blood Group, Fasting Sugar, Lipid Profile, TMT, KFT; above ₹75L includes comprehensive cardiac, liver, lung function, diabetes markers, imaging tests). Children below 18 get physical exam, eye, dental, growth charting, and urine examination.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: 60 Days Pre / 180 Days Post (for ₹25L/50L/1Cr/2Cr/3Cr/6Cr variants). Optional 'Pre-Post Hospitalization Expenses Modification' can extend these periods.
column18: Yes - Unlimited e-consultations with general physicians via official Care Health Insurance mobile app (built-in benefit or via Protect Plus add-on depending on variant). Also includes Health Portal (healthy tips, digital locker for medical records) and Discount Connect (special rates for OPD, diagnostics, maternity, pharmacy at network providers).
column19: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured for medical expenses incurred on the organ donor for organ harvesting operation, subject to Transplantation of Human Organs Act, 1994 compliance and the insured being the recipient.

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to Lifelong (No max age limit) | Children: 90 days to 24 years. Note: For Plan 2 (7L/10L), Individual entry min is 46 years; Floater eldest member min is 46 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: Low-Moderate (INR 6,000–12,000/year for 5L, Plan 1 only) | Age 36-50: Moderate (INR 12,000–22,000/year for 5L, Plan 1 only) | Age 50+: High (INR 20,000–45,000+/year; primary target segment with full SI access). Plan 2 (7L/10L) is exclusively priced for 46+ age group
room_rent_capping_rules: 3L SI: Twin Sharing Room subject to max 1% of SI per day | 5L SI: Twin Sharing Room | 7L/10L SI: Single Private Room
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% of original Sum Insured once per policy year upon exhaustion for unrelated illnesses (Not available for 3L SI)
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered (Optional Good Health+ add-on available providing up to 8 consultations at network providers)
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in as Consumable Allowance: INR 500/day (3L), INR 750/day (5L/7L), INR 1,000/day (10L); Max 7 days per hospitalization after 3 days
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Not Covered | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 20% mandatory co-pay per claim (increases by additional 10% to 30% total when insured person or eldest floater member attains age 71; waiver available on extra premium if entry age ≤70)
no_claim_bonus_structure: No NCB / Not Available
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults (annually). Optional Health Check+ add-on upgrades to Diabetes or Cardiac health check-up
pre_post_hospitalization_days: 30 Days Pre / 30 Days Post (subject to percentage-based sub-limits: up to 7.5% of payable hospitalization expenses for 3L-5L; up to 10% for 7L-10L)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: No
organ_donor_expenses_rules: No

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to Lifetime Entry (No Upper Age Limit) | Children: 91 days to 25 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: Low-Moderate (~₹5,500-₹9,500/year for 5L SI in Tier 2) | Age 36-50: Moderate (~₹9,000-₹15,000/year for 5L SI in Tier 2) | Age 50+: High (~₹16,000-₹26,000+/year for 5L SI in Tier 2). Tier 1 cities (Delhi, Mumbai, Ahmedabad, etc.) command 15-25% higher premium. Optional co-pay (10-25%) and room rent modification reduce premium.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping by default (Any Room). Optional Room Rent Modification available: Capped at 1% of Basic Sum Insured per day (max ₹5,000/day) for room rent and 2% of Basic Sum Insured (max ₹10,000/day) for ICU
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered in Base Plan. Available via optional Parent & Child Care Cover (Basic/Booster): Normal Delivery up to INR 15,000-80,000 / C-Section up to INR 25,000-2,00,000 with 48 months waiting period (modifiable to 36/24/12 months). Includes New Born Baby cover and Vaccination
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% Sum Insured Rebound once per policy year (adds back claim amount up to Basic SI). For Chemotherapy and Dialysis, applicable only once in lifetime of policy
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered in Base Plan. Optional Outpatient Dental Treatment after 3 continuous years (50% of cost, max ₹5,000-₹20,000). Optional Parent & Child Care Booster includes pre/post-natal OPD. Wellness services offer discounts on OPD/Pharmacy via HDFC ERGO Mobile App
consumables_cover_status: No - Excluded in Base Plan. Yes - via Optional Non-Medical Expenses Cover (Section C-10)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Optional cover up to INR 2,00,000 / 5,00,000 / 10,00,000 | Global Cover: Optional Global Health Cover available (Section C-18) with USD 100 deductible per claim, reimbursement in INR
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) by default. Optional Co-Payment: 10%, 15%, 20%, or 25%. Additionally, 20% co-pay applies for Tier 2 policyholders availing treatment in Tier 1 cities
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network - 15,100+ empaneled hospitals and diagnostic centers across 610+ districts
no_claim_bonus_structure: 5% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a max of 50% of Basic SI (Standard). Optional Extended Cumulative Bonus: 10% per year up to 100% (Silver/Gold Smart) or 25% per year up to 200% (Platinum Smart)
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available after every block of 4 consecutive claim-free years (Standard). Optional Preventive Health Check-Up Booster: Available from Year 1 irrespective of claims
