teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited tele-consultation via HDFC ERGO Mobile App, Health Coach services (disease management, nutrition, fitness, psychological counseling), fitness discounts up to 10% on renewal premium, wellness discounts on OPD/pharmacy/diagnostics
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured for harvesting organ from donor (Section A-8). Pre/Post hospitalization of donor excluded

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: Not Applicable (Individual-only plan)
premium_description: Age 20-35: ~INR 15,000-20,000/year for 5L cover; Age 36-50: ~INR 17,000-25,000/year for 5L cover; Age 50+: ~INR 27,000-50,000/year for 5L cover. Premiums are 20-40% higher than standard plans due to specialized diabetes/hypertension coverage. Optional 20% co-pay reduces premium by ~15-20%.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% once per policy year for unrelated illnesses. Restored sum insured lapses if unused in the same policy year.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered
consumables_cover_status: No
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Not Covered | Global Cover: No (India-only coverage)
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) by default; Optional 20% co-pay available at purchase to reduce premium
no_claim_bonus_structure: 10% increase in Sum Insured per year up to a maximum of 100% of base Sum Insured
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults. Gold variant includes two complete wellness medical check-ups per policy year (cashless up to INR 2,000) covering HbA1c, BP, BMI, lipid profile, and other parameters.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Personalized wellness portal, health coach for diet/fitness planning, centralized helpline, and wellness reward points (up to 25% renewal premium discount based on health parameters)
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 45 years | Children: 5 to 25 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: INR 6,863 - 15,000/year (5 Lakh cover) | Age 36-45: INR 12,000 - 28,000/year | Age 50+: Not applicable for new entry (max entry age 45); renewal premiums scale with age
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping for SI ≥ INR 5 Lakh; Single Private AC Room eligibility for lower SI slabs as per policy schedule
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to INR 60,000 after 36 Months waiting (Activ Fit Preferred variant only; Not Covered in Plus variant)
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times for same and different illnesses (Binge Refill)
opd_coverage_details: Yes - via Optional OPD Rider Add-on (cashless outpatient consultations through empanelled providers in selected cities; limit as per policy schedule)
consumables_cover_status: Yes - via Non-Medical Expenses Waiver Add-on
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered as per policy schedule limits | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay)
no_claim_bonus_structure: 10% increase in Sum Insured per year up to a max of 100% (Optional Super NCB add-on: additional 50% per year up to 100%)
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults (cashless basis)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited via Activ Health App (tele-consultation, e-consultation, fitness tracking, and HealthReturns™ rewards)
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to No Maximum Age | Children: 91 days to 25 years (children 91 days to 5 years require one adult to be covered)
premium_description: Age 20-35: Approx INR 5,000 - 10,000 annually for 5L cover (Standard) | Age 36-50: Approx INR 10,000 - 20,000 annually (Moderate) | Age 50+: Approx INR 20,000 - 40,000+ annually (High). Varies by zone, room category, and family composition.
room_rent_capping_rules: Tiered by Sum Insured: Any Room (No Capping) for SI >7 Lakhs | Single Private AC Room for SI 5-7 Lakhs | Shared Room Only for SI <5 Lakhs
maternity_benefit_details: Optional Cover - Covered up to specified Maternity Sum Insured after 48 Months waiting period; maximum 2 events lifetime (2 deliveries or 2 terminations or 1 delivery + 1 termination); age 18-45 years. Not an in-built benefit.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% reload of Sum Insured for subsequent claims due to unrelated illness. For accidents, reload can trigger from the 1st claim itself.
opd_coverage_details: Optional Cover - Up to INR 1,000 for SI ≥15 Lakhs. Chronic Management Program (OPD) available as per Annexure 1. Not Covered as in-built benefit.
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in
air_ambulance_global_cover: Domestic Air Ambulance: Available via Domestic Emergency Assistance Services | International Air Ambulance: Available via International Emergency Assistance Services | Global Cover: Optional (International Coverage for Major Illnesses as add-on; not in-built)
copay_percentage: 0% (No Mandatory Co-pay) for SI ≥4 Lakhs; Zone-based co-pay of 10%/15%/25% applies for SI ≤3 Lakhs when treated in a higher zone than eligible
no_claim_bonus_structure: 50% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a maximum of 100% (capped at INR 1 Crore). No clawback on claim unless utilized.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults, once per policy year
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited via official app including Medical, Nutritional, Mental & Fitness coaching; Homeopathy tele-consultation for SI ≥4 Lakhs; Mental counselling sessions; Second E-Opinion on Critical Illness available; HealthReturns™ up to 100% of premium; Wellness Coach access
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 3 months to 30 years (renewable up to 35 years for dependent children)
premium_description: Age 20-35: Low-to-Moderate (approx. INR 4,500 - 8,000 p.a. for 5L cover in Zone A) | Age 36-50: Moderate-to-High (approx. INR 8,000 - 16,000 p.a.) | Age 50+: High (approx. INR 16,000 - 35,000+ p.a.); premiums vary by Zone A/B/C with 20-30% discounts for lower zones
room_rent_capping_rules: SI 3L to 7.5L: Single Private AC Room maximum | SI 10L and above: Any room category (No Capping). Optional room rent capping discount available (1.5% of SI per day, max INR 7,500/day) for additional premium discount.
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to 2 deliveries/terminations per lifetime. SI 3L-7.5L: INR 15,000 normal / INR 25,000 C-section. SI 10L-50L: INR 25,000 normal / INR 35,000 C-section. Pre- and post-natal hospitalization covered within maternity limit. Waiting period: 72 Months. Newborn baby cover included for 90 days from birth within maternity limit.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - Recharge Benefit: 20% of base Sum Insured or INR 5,00,000, whichever is less, once per policy year. For Individual policies, applicable once per insured member per year. For Floater, applicable cumulatively to all members once per year. Unutilized recharge cannot be carried forward.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered as built-in benefit. Available via Health Prime rider/add-on covering tele & in-person consultations, diagnostics, dental OPD, and annual health check-ups.
consumables_cover_status: No - Extensive list of non-medical consumables (gloves, masks, PPE, nebulization kits, oxygen masks, surgical items, etc.) are explicitly excluded/non-payable under the policy. Only medically necessary drugs and medicines prescribed during inpatient hospitalization are covered.
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Available as Optional Add-on for SI 5L and above (sub-limits vary by base SI, up to actual expenses). Not covered as built-in. Global Cover: No - Coverage restricted to India only.
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) mandatory. Voluntary co-pay options available: 10% co-pay for 10% premium discount or 20% co-pay for 20% premium discount. 20% co-pay applies for Zone B policyholders availing treatment in Zone A cities (excluding accidental hospitalization).
no_claim_bonus_structure: 10% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year, up to a maximum of 100% of base Sum Insured.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Free preventive health check-up available once in a block of 3 years for all lives under Individual policy. For Family Floater, available only for the proposer and spouse.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: No - Not covered as built-in. Tele-consultation available via Health Prime rider/add-on. Wellness discount program (Healthkarats) offers up to 10% renewal premium discount + 2.5% additional for meeting health parameters (BMI, blood pressure, HbA1c, steps count, etc.).
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured for harvesting of donated organ for transplant into the insured person, subject to compliance with THE TRANSPLANTATION OF HUMAN ORGANS (AMENDMENT) BILL, 2011 and admissibility of inpatient hospitalization claim.

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 55 years (Plans A/B/C) | 56 to 75 years (Plan D) | Children: Not Covered
premium_description: Flat premium structure within age brackets. Plan A: ₹4,999/year | Plan B: ₹9,999/year | Plan C: ₹14,999/year | Plan D: ₹19,999/year. Premiums remain constant across 18-55 yrs (Plans A-C) and 56-75 yrs (Plan D). OPD benefit limits decrease with increasing age within each bracket.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping - Covered up to Reasonable and Customary charges subject to Sum Insured
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: No
opd_coverage_details: Covered - Limits vary by plan variant and age band. Plan A OPD Self: ₹1,600-₹3,100 | Plan B OPD Self: ₹3,000-₹6,500 / Self+Spouse: ₹1,000-₹5,200 | Plan C-1 OPD Self: ₹7,500-₹9,500 / Self+Spouse: ₹4,500-₹9,000 | Plan C-2 OPD Self: ₹6,000-₹9,000 / Self+Spouse: ₹2,500-₹8,000 | Plan D OPD Self: ₹11,000-₹13,000 / Self+Spouse: ₹8,000-₹11,000. Includes doctor consultations, pharmacy, diagnostics, crutches (Day 1), spectacles (from Year 2, max 25% of OPD limit), dentures and hearing aids (from Year 3, max 25% of OPD limit).
consumables_cover_status: No
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Not Covered | Global Cover: No - Restricted to India only
copay_percentage: 0% at Network Hospitals | 10% mandatory co-pay if treatment taken at non-Network Hospital. Waiver available on payment of additional premium.
no_claim_bonus_structure: Not Applicable
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available after every 4 continuous claim-free years. Covers Physician Consultation, Fasting Blood Glucose, Complete Blood Count, Serum Cholesterol, Urine Routine, X-ray Chest at Bajaj Allianz Diagnostic Centre. Either insured or spouse (one person) can avail.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: No
organ_donor_expenses_rules: No

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 91 days to 25 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: Moderate-High (approx. INR 15,000 - 35,000 p.a. for 50L cover, Zone 1) | Age 36-50: High (approx. INR 35,000 - 80,000 p.a. for 50L cover, Zone 1) | Age 50+: Very High (approx. INR 80,000 - 2,00,000+ p.a. for 50L cover, Zone 1). Global variant commands a significant premium over the India variant. Rates vary by zone and sum insured.
room_rent_capping_rules: For Sum Insured up to INR 2 Crore: Any room category except Suite or higher | For Sum Insured INR 3 Crore: Any room category including Suite | No room rent capping for hospitalization outside India under Global coverage
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times per policy year for unrelated illnesses (applicable to India coverage / Sum Insured1)
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered as base benefit. Optional add-ons available: (1) Health 360 OPD Rider for domestic OPD with cashless consultations, diagnostics and pharmacy limits of INR 20,000 to 50,000 | (2) Global+ Package covers OPD expenses abroad up to INR 1 Lakh for covered Major Illnesses
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in during hospitalization up to Sum Insured1 | Yes - via Health+ Rider for extended non-medical items and medical devices up to INR 2 Lakh once in 3 Policy Years
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Domestic covered up to INR 10 Lakh via optional Health+ Package (maximum 1 event per Policy Year) | Global ambulance (road and air) covered as base for Major Illnesses abroad | Global Cover: Yes - covers 27 Major Illnesses for treatment outside India with Area of Cover options: (i) Worldwide excluding India, or (ii) Worldwide excluding India, USA and Canada
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay)
network_hospital_tier: Pan-India Network (8,500+ hospitals across Tier 1, Tier 2 and Tier 3 cities)
no_claim_bonus_structure: 15% increase in Sum Insured per year (Guaranteed Cumulative Bonus), irrespective of claims, with no capping on accumulation
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Tele-consultations available via tele/chat mode through insurer's network providers at no extra cost. App-based policy services and cashless OPD booking available via Visit Health / MediBuddy partners for riders opted
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured1

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 75 years | Children: 16 days to 25 years (Floater) / 91 days to 75 years (Individual)
premium_description: Age 20-35: Standard-Moderate (approx. INR 8,000 - 15,000 p.a. for 5L cover, Zone D) | Age 36-50: Moderate (approx. INR 15,000 - 28,000 p.a. for 5L cover, Zone D) | Age 50+: High (approx. INR 28,000 - 55,000+ p.a. for 5L cover, Zone D). Premiums are 15-30% higher in Zone A (Delhi/Mumbai) and scale with sum insured and family size. Deep floater discounts available: 40% for adult children, 10% per parent.
room_rent_capping_rules: Capped at 1% of Sum Insured per day for INR 5,00,000 and INR 7,50,000 Sum Insured options | Any room except Suite or above category for INR 10,00,000 / 15,00,000 / 20,00,000 / 25,00,000 options | Any Room (including Suite) for INR 50,00,000 / 75,00,000 / 1,00,00,000 / 2,00,00,000 options
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to 10% of Sum Insured after 24 Months waiting. Available only on Floater policies. Both self and spouse must be covered continuously for 24 months. Maximum 2 deliveries in lifetime. Pre and Post hospitalization not applicable.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times per policy year for subsequent hospitalizations (triggers immediately upon partial/full utilization of Sum Insured)
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in (non-medical items / consumables covered up to Sum Insured subject to an admissible inpatient/day care claim)
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to 10% of Sum Insured per policy year (India only, for emergency care where ground transport is not feasible) | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) for entry age below 61 years | 10% mandatory co-pay for entry age 61 years and above
no_claim_bonus_structure: 25% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a max of 100% of Sum Insured
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults (limits: up to INR 2,000 for Individual policy / up to INR 5,000 for Floater policy per policy year, irrespective of claims)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited Tele-Consultations via Star Health mobile app and digital platforms. AI-driven face scan (2 times per month) for vital parameters. Star Wellness Program offering up to 20% renewal discount for healthy lifestyle activities.
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured (over and above the base Sum Insured limit; donor expenses for complications including redo surgery/ICU admission also covered)

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to No Max Limit years | Children: 91 days to 24 years
premium_description: Age 20-35: Standard/Low (approx. ₹8,000–₹15,000 p.a. for ₹10L cover) | Age 36-50: Moderate (approx. ₹15,000–₹30,000 p.a. for ₹10L cover) | Age 50+: High (approx. ₹40,000–₹80,000+ p.a. for ₹10L cover). Note: Minimum Sum Insured for this plan is ₹10 Lakhs; no 5L option available. Premiums vary by zone, family composition, and underwriting.
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping / No Limit; any room category including Single Private AC, Deluxe, Suite, or ICU fully covered without proportional deduction.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% unlimited times within the same policy year for unrelated illnesses; related illnesses subject to Base Sum Insured limit per illness.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered
consumables_cover_status: Yes - Built-in
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance covered up to Sum Insured under Domestic Emergency Evacuation benefit (India only, pre-authorization required) | Global Cover: No
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay)
no_claim_bonus_structure: 10% increase in Sum Insured per year up to a max of 100% of Base SI (Inflation Protect feature; accrues even if claims are made)
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 1 for all adults aged 18 and above
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - Unlimited via official app (Doctor on Call built-in)
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 years to No Limit | Children: 1 day to 25 years (as dependents)
premium_description: Age 20-35: approx INR 4,500 - 7,500/year | Age 36-50: approx INR 9,000 - 16,000/year | Age 50+: approx INR 18,000 - 27,000+/year (benchmarked for Vital Plan, 5 Lakh Sum Insured)
room_rent_capping_rules: No Capping
maternity_benefit_details: Covered up to INR 15,000-1,00,000 (sub-limits vary by plan variant) after 24 Months (Dependent Spouse) / 36 Months (Primary Insured) waiting
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% once per policy year for same/different illnesses
opd_coverage_details: Covered up to INR 3,000 (Individual) / INR 10,000 (Floater) for Superior & Premiere Plans only; Vital Plan: Not Covered. Medications covered under Premiere only (80% of admissible bills)
consumables_cover_status: No
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Not Covered | Global Cover: Yes - Medical Treatment Abroad up to Sum Insured for listed conditions under Premiere Plan only (after 36 months continuous coverage, reimbursement basis)
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) for entry below 60 years | 20% mandatory co-pay for 60-64 years | 25% for 65-69 years | 30% for 70-74 years | 40% for 75+ years
no_claim_bonus_structure: 50% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year up to a maximum of 100% of base Sum Insured. Reduced by 50% of base SI upon claim (not below base SI)
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available from Year 2 for all adults as per plan limits (Vital: max 2 persons | Superior: max 3 persons | Premiere: max 4 persons per policy year)
pre_post_hospitalization_days: 60 Days Pre / 90 Days Post (Vital) | 120 Days Post (Superior) | 180 Days Post (Premiere)
teleconsultation_digital_perks: Yes - E-Opinion up to 2 per policy year via official panel | Wellness benefits available
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured for harvesting expenses (excludes donor screening, pre/post hospitalization for donor, and organ acquisition costs)

entry_age_description: Adults: 18 to 65 years | Children: 3 months to 25 years (financially dependent). Lifelong renewal available if continuous. Upper age limit waived for mentally challenged children and unmarried dependent daughters.
premium_description: For INR 5 Lakhs cover (Zone 2, base premium excluding GST): Age 20-35 ≈ INR 7,000-9,000/year | Age 36-50 ≈ INR 9,000-14,000/year | Age 50+ ≈ INR 14,000-21,000/year. Zone 1 (Maharashtra & Gujarat) premiums are higher. 15% discount available for voluntary 20% co-pay. Long-term discounts: 5% for 2 years, 7% for 3 years.
room_rent_capping_rules: Capped at 1% of Sum Insured per day for standard room rent and 2% of Sum Insured per day for ICU/ICCU. Proportionate deduction applies on other hospital expenses if room rent/ICU limits are exceeded. Optional Cover I (No Proportionate Deduction) available for additional premium; insured must still bear differential between actual and eligible room rent.
maternity_benefit_details: Not Covered by default. Optional Cover II available for Sum Insured INR 5 Lakhs and above: Covered up to 10% of average Sum Insured of preceding 3 years, with 36-month waiting period from date of opting. First two children only. Pre-natal and post-natal expenses not covered unless part of inpatient hospitalization.
restoration_benefit_rules: Yes - 100% once per policy year for unrelated illnesses only, triggered when base Sum Insured and Cumulative Bonus are fully exhausted. Available for Sum Insured of INR 5 Lakhs and above.
opd_coverage_details: Not Covered
consumables_cover_status: Yes - via Rider (Optional Cover V). Available for Sum Insured INR 8 Lakhs and above. Covers non-medical consumables (non-payable items) up to INR 15,000 per policy period. Additional premium of INR 1,500.
air_ambulance_global_cover: Air Ambulance: Not Covered | Global Cover: No (Policy covers treatment and services rendered only in India). Ground ambulance covered up to 1% of Sum Insured per insured event.
copay_percentage: 0% (No Co-pay) by default. Optional voluntary co-pay of 20% available for 15% premium discount.
no_claim_bonus_structure: 25% increase in Sum Insured per claim-free year, up to a maximum of 50% of base Sum Insured.
annual_health_checkup_terms: Yes - Available every 3 claim-free years (not annually). Reimbursement restricted to INR 5,000 or 1% of average Sum Insured in preceding 3 years, whichever is less.
teleconsultation_digital_perks: No
organ_donor_expenses_rules: Yes - Covered up to Sum Insured (aggregate of donor and recipient expenses shall not exceed Sum Insured + Cumulative Bonus of the recipient). Cost of organ itself is excluded.
